title: Extra Extractinator Compatibility
description: Adds compatibility for various mods to the Extractinator mod
body:
This mod adds compatibility for the [Extractinator](https://modrinth.com/mod/extractinator) to use the silt blocks (and permafrost) from the [Twigs](https://modrinth.com/mod/twigs) and [Immersive Weathering](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-weathering) mods.

The currently supported blocks are:
- Silt (Twigs)
- Permafrost (Immersive Weathering)
- Grassy Permafrost (Immersive Weathering)
- Silt (Immersive Weathering)
- Grassy Silt (Immersive Weathering)
- Silty Farmland (Immersive Weathering)
